description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a gold and black color scheme, featuring a collapsible stock and a prominent pistol grip. The receiver and magazine well are finished in gold, while the handguard and barrel are black, providing a striking contrast. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and standard iron sights mounted on the top rail. The barrel is of standard length and appears to have a flash hider at the muzzle. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is important. The materials suggest a combination of metal for the main body and polymer for the stock and grip.
description: A gold and black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and standard iron sights, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold receiver, black handguard, collapsible stock, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and details of the collapsible stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and alignment of the upper receiver.
